title: Process Engineer Vacancy at ITC Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at ITC Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
ITC Limited has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Jabalpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About ITC Limited:
ITC Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ITC Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
